arts.ttl: Man Utd boss Erik ten Hag missed out on job offer after players intervened
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag continues to be under pressure at Manchester United, but he could have been manning a very different dugout had things gone differently this summer

arts.ttl: Manchester United have seven games and 44 days to revive Erik ten Hag's greatest strength
arts.sum: Man Utd have an encouraging run of fixtures coming up and they need to take advantage of their Old Trafford matches to build up a head of steam.

arts.ttl: Edinson Cavani snubs Man Utd team-mate Cristiano Ronaldo when naming four football 'geniuses'
arts.sum: Lionel Messi has received a glowing review from Edinson Cavani, who has overlooked former Manchester United team-mate Cristiano Ronaldo when describing some of football's finest brains

arts.ttl: Man Utd v Brentford Predicted Lineups and Starting 11s for Premier League Match
arts.sum: Manchester United will go head-to-head with Brentford in the Premier League at Old Trafford on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Why is Man Utd vs Brentford not on TV in the UK? How to watch Premier League match
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag will be hoping he can navigate his side to three points when Manchester United face Brentford this Saturday as the Premier League resumes after the international break

arts.ttl: 'I became a Man Utd icon – but Sir Alex Ferguson met me at school to give me hairdryer'
arts.sum: Nicky Butt has opened up on a time when Sir Alex Ferguson gave him the hairdryer treatment after he was caught misbehaving at school, with the Man Utd legend even threatening to axe him

arts.sum: Man Utd take on Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday and here's how our writers think they should start.

arts.ttl: Man Utd chiefs will oversee two managerial auditions vs Brentford as Erik ten Hag fights for job
arts.sum: Manchester United face Brentford at Old Trafford following the international and are looking to turn around their season with Erik ten Hag still in the hotseat

arts.ttl: Manchester United face alarming reality after shocking comment exposed injury problem
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo has been ruled out for a few weeks with an injury and the handling of him has been questionable.

arts.ttl: 'I was a promising Man Utd youngster - Sir Alex Ferguson came to my school just to give me hairdryer'
arts.sum: Nicky Butt and Paul Scholes have opened up on their relationship with Sir Alex Ferguson as teenagers, with Butt revealing just how scary the Manchester United boss could be
